regex.target: .setName("在使用 IME 输入时禁用")

regex.source: .setDesc("If turned on, braces won't be inserted in tables. Decorations & atomic ranges are enabled regardless of this setting.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果开启该选项，表格中不会插入大括号。无论此设置如何，文本装饰和块引用仍然会被启用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("This option can be helpful for avoiding some strange behavior occurring when using IME inputs after escaping from a math block with the Latex Suite plugin's tabout feature.")
regex.target: .setDesc("此选项有助于避免在使用 IME 输入法并通过 Latex Suite 插件的 tabout 功能退出数学块后，可能出现的一些异常行为。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If turned on, decorations to hide braces adjacent to dollar signs are disabled. This is especially useful when you want to see what this plugin does under the hood.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果开启此选项，与 $ 符号相邻的大括号隐藏装饰将被禁用。这对于查看该插件的内部工作原理特别有用。")
